scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:push: docker compose exec backend npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec backend npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: docker compose exec backend npx prisma studio
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate reset --force
